stemHtml: What is the most efficient way to fly with a failed engine on a twin piston engine aeroplane?

options.a: Wings level and rudder to good engine.
options.b: Slight bank angle towards the dead engine and rudder towards the good engine.
options.c: Slight bank angle and rudder towards the good engine.
options.d: Slight bank angle towards the good engine and rudder towards the dead engine.
